Dracaena draco, also known as the Dragon Tree, is a succulent plant native to the Canary Islands, known for its distinctive crown of leaves and resinous sap. The health benefits of Dracaena draco include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain, promote wound healing, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Dracaena draco include dracorhodin, dracocanthin, and other terpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. The most common herbal preparations made with Dracaena draco include tinctures, essential oils, and ointments, often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
